ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "hour_ending" TEXT /* Timestamp representing the hour ending for the data */,
  "coast" REAL /* Energy consumption in MWh for the COAST region */,
  "east" REAL /* Energy consumption in MWh for the EAST region */,
  "fwest" REAL /* Energy consumption in MWh for the FWEST region */,
  "north" REAL /* Energy consumption in MWh for the NORTH region */,
  "ncent" REAL /* Energy consumption in MWh for the NCENT region */,
  "south" REAL /* Energy consumption in MWh for the SOUTH region */,
  "scent" REAL /* Energy consumption in MWh for the SCENT region */,
  "west" REAL /* Energy consumption in MWh for the WEST region */,
  "ercot" REAL /* Total energy consumption in MWh for the entire ERCOT region */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the weather_data table */,
  "demand_response_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the demand_response table */,
  "forecasted_consumption" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption in MWh for the given hour */,
  "actual_consumption" REAL /* Actual energy consumption in MWh for the given hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_demand_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("demand_response_id") REFERENCES demand_response ("demand_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's center */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., system operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., 'read,write,admin') */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the regions table */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_response" (
  "demand_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand response event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the demand response event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the demand response event */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the regions table */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of demand response event (e.g., peak load reduction, load shifting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_response_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
